params.name: OEA
params.description: A basic chemical analysis instrument. Equipped with a micro-processor for condition control and data processing, it's capable of quantitative analysis of common elements in organic solid like carbon, protium, and nitrogen. Both the chemical and food industries make extensive use of it.
